title: pseudogynoxys lobata
intro: Pseudogynoxys lobata, also known as Chrysanthemum flower or False Flaxen, is a flowering plant species native to the Andean region of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Pseudogynoxys lobata include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. Pseudogynoxys lobata is traditionally used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
